summary: Executed backend + frontend regression for stylist scheduling improvements. Core requested flows passed: Elena login, day navigation, detailed day cards, one-time + recurring breaks, recurring break removal, long booking vertical block rendering, weekly booking detail modal fields, and working-hours/status-button regressions. Additional auth playbook checks uncovered security gaps (no app auth cookie, permissive CORS with credentials, no brute-force lockout).

critical.issue: No brute-force lockout: after 6 invalid PIN attempts, correct PIN still succeeds immediately.
Auth token is returned in JSON and stored client-side; app does not set an application auth HttpOnly cookie.
CORS allows credentials with wildcard origin (Access-Control-Allow-Origin: *). Should use explicit origins for credentialed auth contexts.

action_items: Implement brute-force protection/rate-limit for stylist (and ideally owner) login endpoints with temporary lockout/backoff.
Align auth implementation with playbook: set secure HttpOnly auth cookie for login flow if cookie-based auth is intended.
Replace wildcard CORS with explicit allowed origins when allow_credentials=true.
After auth hardening, rerun auth + stylist scheduling regressions.
critical_code_review_comments: server.py sets allow_credentials=True while origin defaults to '*' via CORS_ORIGINS fallback; this is unsafe for auth-sensitive apps.
No lockout state/counter exists in stylist_login path; repeated invalid attempts are not throttled.
Stylist schedule/availability APIs correctly hydrate service details and exclude recurring/one-time breaks from customer availability.
seed_data_creation: Created temporary TEST_STYLIST bookings and temporary break/recurring block entries during automated tests; cleanup applied in pytest teardown and UI remove actions.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All requested stylist scheduling enhancements are functionally verified in this run across API + UI. Remaining failures are auth/security playbook checks (lockout/cookie/CORS). Re-run /app/backend/tests/test_stylist_portal_schedule_breaks.py and targeted auth checks after fixes.
rca of the issue: RCA (auth gaps): (1) /api/stylist/login compares static PIN without attempt tracking, so brute-force is unmitigated; (2) owner login returns bearer token in JSON only, no app-set HttpOnly auth cookie path; (3) CORS configured with wildcard fallback while credentials enabled. Reproduction: repeat wrong PIN POSTs to /api/stylist/login, then valid PIN still returns 200; inspect owner login response headers/body and OPTIONS preflight headers to confirm token transport and permissive CORS.
